_meta.purpose: Seed import for Vermont pickup soccer fields. Confirmed entries are 'approved'; one Brattleboro entry is 'pending' because its schedule is 2 years old and needs a phone confirmation before going live.

shape.locations[]: Each item is shaped like submitLocation args (name, town, address, lat, lng, details, schedules) plus _seedKey / status / _sourceUrl / _organizer / _verifyBefore for the importer.
shape.schedules[]: Each entry maps 1:1 to a locationSchedules row. dayOfWeek 0=Sunday … 6=Saturday. startTime is HH:mm 24-hour, America/New_York.
shape.details: Markdown. Already includes the source link so attribution survives a plain submitLocation call.
shape.ownerId/status/submittedAt/approvedAt: Importer must set ownerId to the admin user (lookup users by ADMIN_EMAIL), status from the entry's `status` field, submittedAt = Date.now(), and approvedAt = Date.now() for approved entries.

consolidations: Essex Junction Expo Center: research had two entries (Nordic 8 PM 8v8 + Saturday Late 9:30 PM) at the same address — collapsed into one location with two schedules.
Burlington Womxn's Pickup: research had two entries (Summer outdoor at Starr Farm vs Winter indoor at Robert Miller). Different venues, so kept as two separate locations.
excluded: Sunday Mexicali League — no concrete venue/time confirmed; kept under _leads for follow-up.
GoodRec UVM Indoor & Virtue Field — no recurring schedule published (dynamic per-game).
BTV Pickup Soccer Facebook group — coordination channel, not a recurring fixture.
Capital Soccer Club Montpelier — no public adult drop-in schedule.
Waterbury 'Soccer for Little Feet' — ages 3–5, not adult pickup.

locations.name: Sunday Morning Pickup Soccer
locations.details:
Indoor 7v7 open (mixed gender), 16+. $15/Sunday, goalkeepers free. Organized by Social Sports VT at Shelburne Field House. Roster fills fast — Field 1 first, Field 2 opens once 16+ players sign up.

**Organizer:** Social Sports VT
**Source:** https://www.socialsportsvt.com/recreational-pickup-soccer

locations.name: Vermont Womxn's Pick-up Soccer (Summer)
locations.details:
Outdoor pickup at Starr Farm Park, summer season. Free. 18+. Welcomes cis-women, trans, intersex, non-binary, and gender non-conforming players, all skill levels. No portable toilets on-site.

**Organizer:** Vermont Womxn's Pick-up Soccer (Meetup)
**Source:** https://www.meetup.com/Womens-Soccer-Vermont/

locations.name: Vermont Womxn's Pick-up Soccer (Winter)
locations.details:
Indoor pickup at Robert Miller Community & Recreation Center, winter season. $80 per 8-visit session, registration required (no drop-in). Welcomes cis-women, trans, intersex, non-binary, and gender non-conforming players, all skill levels.

Register via [enjoyburlington.com](https://enjoyburlington.com) or call 802-864-0123.

**Organizer:** Vermont Womxn's Pick-up Soccer (Meetup)
**Source:** https://www.meetup.com/Womens-Soccer-Vermont/

locations.name: Nordic Indoor Soccer Center
locations.details:
Adult coed pickup inside the Champlain Valley Expo. $9/player. Two Saturday slots:

- **8:00 PM** — first 16 spots fill the 8v8; overflow plays 5v5/6v6.
- **9:30 PM** — late slot, same building.

Nordic waiver required. Sign-ups via [OpenSports](https://opensports.net) / VPSC.

**Organizer:** Vermont Pickup Soccer Club
**Sources:**
- https://opensports.net/posts/pickup-soccer-nordic-indoor-soccer-center-BtWgZV9Y7
- https://opensports.net/posts/saturday-indoor-soccer-expo-center-QDzDf2p0b

locations._verifyBefore: Last confirmed season was Oct 2023 – Apr 2024 (Thursdays 7–9 PM). Call 802-254-5808 to confirm current season and exact street number before approving.
locations.name: Brattleboro Adult Soccer / Futsal
locations.address: Gibson-Aiken Center, 207 Main St, Brattleboro, VT 05301
locations.details:
Adult drop-in soccer / futsal in the 3rd-floor gym at the Gibson-Aiken Center. Run by Brattleboro Recreation & Parks. Last reported season ran Oct 2023 – Apr 2024 on Thursdays 7–9 PM — confirm the current season is live before relying on this.

**Organizer:** Brattleboro Recreation & Parks (802-254-5808)
**Source:** https://www.reformer.com/sports/adult-soccer-futsal-at-brattleboro-recreation-and-parks/article_05d922e8-6467-11ee-bb97-47c676cef454.html

_leads.name: Sunday Mexicali League
_leads.verifyBefore: Meetup group root returned 'Group not found' — open the event link directly to recover venue/time.

_leads.name: GoodRec — Indoor Turf Field, UVM
_leads.details: GoodRec advertises pickup 'every day' but games are spun up dynamically in-app — no fixed recurring slot.

_leads.name: GoodRec — Virtue Field, UVM
_leads.details: Outdoor turf at UVM. Same caveat as Gutterson — no fixed recurring day/time published.

_leads.name: BTV Pickup Soccer (Facebook group)
_leads.details: Coordination channel rather than a recurring fixture. Worth posting in to discover unlisted recurring games.

_leads.name: Capital Soccer Club indoor (Montpelier)
_leads.address: Central Vermont Memorial Civic Center, 268 Gallison Hill Rd, Montpelier, VT 05602
_leads.details: CSC runs indoor leagues and clinics on the converted ice-rink turf in March–April. No public adult drop-in pickup schedule found — contact club directly to see if any slot is open pickup.

_searchedButNoResults: Rutland, VT — no recurring adult pickup found
White River Junction / Upper Valley — no recurring adult pickup found (UVRA exists but no pickup listing)
Stowe — youth club only, no adult pickup
Norwich / Hanover — nothing VT-side; NH options exist across the river
